name: Oriental Rhubarb Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the rhubarb, sugar, five spice powder, ginger, hot pepper sauce and lemon juice; blend well.
2. Place over low heat, stirring constantly until the sugar dissolves.
3. Bring to boil, skim off foam and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the mixture becomes transparent and thickens, about 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Ladle into hot, sterilized jars; seal.
5. Makes about four 6 ounce jars.
